characters.name: Amy
characters.description: AmyPortrayed ByMelissa LeeGenderFemaleOnly ApperanceStar Crossed Amyis a character in thefirst seasonof theFOXsupernatural dramaTru Calling. She appeared in the episode "Star Crossed".

characters.name: Davis
characters.description: DavisPortrayed ByZach GalifianakisGenderMaleOccupationCoronerStatusAliveFirst AppearancePilotLast Appearance'Twas The Night Before Christmas...AgainTotal Episodes27 Davisis a main character in both seasons of theFOXsupernatural dramaTru Calling. He is portrayed byZach Galifianakis. Davis is Tru's supervisor, friend, and confidante at the Morgue. Years ago, Tru's mother tried to warn him of the car accident that was about to happen. He didn't heed the warning, but Tru's mother flattened his car's tires, thus saving his life, but unable to save his spouse. Spending years living in regret and guilt, now acts as a mentor to Tru. He is a fan ofLord of the Rings, and is currently in a relationship with Dr. Carrie Allen who, unbeknownst to Davis, is a mole working for Jack Harper. In season 1, we find out that Davis is his middle name, although we are not told what his first or last name is. He is shown to be protective of those he cares about but also shy and a bit clueless. He doesn't have many social skills as shown by his interactions with people he doesn't know well. He can also be shown to be serious.
characters.personality_section: He is shown to be protective of those he cares about but also shy and a bit clueless. He doesn't have many social skills as shown by his interactions with people he doesn't know well. He can also be shown to be serious.

characters.name: Elise Davies
characters.description: Elise DaviesGenderFemaleStatusDead Elise Laura Davieswas the mother ofTru,Harrison, andMeredith Davies.

characters.name: Gardez
characters.description: GardezPortrayed ByBenjamín BenítezGenderMaleOccupationMorgue WorkerStatusAliveFirst AppearancePutting Out FiresLast AppearanceValentine Gardezformerly worked at the morgue doing corpse pick-ups and is played byBenjamín Benítez. Gardez was a regular on Tru Calling from episodes 2-12 of Tru Calling season one. He was replaced byJack Harper.

characters.name: Harrison Davies
characters.description: Harrison DaviesPortrayed ByShawn ReavesGenderMaleOccupationPrivate InvestigatorFamilyTru Davies,Meredith Davies,Richard DaviesJorden Davies,Claire Davies,Oliver Davies,StatusAlive (Saved)First AppearancePilotLast Appearance'Twas The Night Before Christmas...AgainTotal Episodes27 Harrison Daviesis a main character in theFOXsupernatural dramaTru Calling. He isTru Davies's younger brother. He is portrayed byShawn Reaves. He and Lindsay were formerly together, however, she broke it off, and married an old friend. Harrison is played by actorShawn Reaves. Harrison is irresponsible but does care about Tru. He was at first skeptical of her powers but began to believe them. He is not good with money, usually gambling it away. He was friends withJack Harperbefore finding out who he really was.
characters.personality_section: Harrison is irresponsible but does care about Tru. He was at first skeptical of her powers but began to believe them. He is not good with money, usually gambling it away. He was friends withJack Harperbefore finding out who he really was.

characters.name: Jack Harper
characters.description: Jack HarperPortrayed ByJason PriestleyGenderMaleOccupationForensic AttendantStatusAliveFirst AppearanceDaddy's GirlLast Appearance'Twas The Night Before Christmas...Again Jack Harper, a counterpart to Tru's character, is introduced mid-first season as a foil and possible love interest. He is there to make sure fate got its way, and introduces a philosophical aspect to Tru's endeavors: should she be saving the lives of people who may have been intended to die? Years before his appearance, he works as a paramedic. While trying to save a kid during a neighborhood shootout, he was shot on the back and was physically dead for minutes until being revived by his co-worker. At some point after the event, Jack finds himself reliving days (presumably begins on the same day as Tru) and admits himself to a psych ward believing that he's become insane after a near-death experience until being approached by Tru's father, Richard.

characters.name: Jen De Luca
characters.description: Jen De Lucais a character from the episodeStar Crossed.

characters.name: Jensen Ritchie
characters.description: Jensen RitchiePortrayed ByEric Christian OlsenGenderMaleStatusAlive (Saved)First AppearanceGraceLast Appearance'Twas The Night Before Christmas...Again Jensen Ritchieis Tru's second season love interest. In Enough, he is shot and killed, and does not ask for help. Tru then manages to find someone else who asks for help and Tru saves Jensen from this fate on her rewind day. However, Tru is just beginning to learn of the consequences of saving someone who does not ask for help. According to online remarks made by the writers if the second season had continued Jensen would eventually have become so fascinated with mortality as a result of his near death experience that he becomes a serial killer. Eventually Tru has to ask Jack for his help in killing him, letting him die as he was supposed to. Jensen is played by Eric Christian Olsen He is also credited asSpecial Guest Starin season two. Jensen Ackles was the producer's first choice to play Tru's love interest on the second season. He turned down the role, which was then offered to another actor. The character's name was changed to 'Jensen' because the producers liked Ackles' name.

characters.name: Lindsay Walker
characters.description: Lindsay WalkerPortrayed ByA. J. CookGenderFemaleStatusAliveFirst AppearancePilotLast AppearanceTwo Weddings and a FuneralTotal Episodes21Lindsay WalkerisTru Davies' best friend in season one. Lindsay andHarrisonused to be together, but Lindsay broke it off, and married an old friend. She is played byA. J. Cook. Lindsay was a series regular for all of season one. Lindsay andTru Davieshave been best friends for a long time. She used to be involved withHarrison Davies, but Lindsay broke it off. InTwo Weddings and a Funeralshe gets married and moves away.

characters.name: Luc Johnston
characters.description: Luc JohnstonPortrayed ByMatt BomerGenderMaleOccupationCrime Scene PhotographerStatusDeadFirst AppearancePast TenseLast AppearanceTwo Weddings and a FuneralTotal Episodes18 Luc JohnstonwasTru Davies' third love interest, who worked as a photographer. Luc was played byMatt Bomer. He was a series regular from episodes six to episode twenty during season one. Luc broke things off with Tru over her constant disappearances and strange behavior. In the season one finale, Tru rewinds the day to save her brother from being shot by a woman's jealous ex-husband. Luc returns to give her a second chance, but storms off confused and angry when she tries to tell him the truth about her powers. Jack claims that the woman can prove Tru's story, and manipulates Luc into going to her house carrying flowers, causing her ex to shoot him instead ofHarrison Davies.

characters.name: Mark Evans
characters.description: Mark EvansPortrayed ByKristoffer PolahaGenderMaleOccupationCollege ProfessorStatusAliveFirst AppearancePilot Mark EvanswasTru Daviesfirst love interest in the show.  He was Tru's college Professor. After Tru spotted Mark cheating on her with another one of his students, she ended the relationship. When Tru had a party, Mark visited, only to be killed by one of Tru's friends. Tru then saved his life after he asked her for help, and she has a proper closure of their relationship.

characters.description: Meredith DaviesPortrayed ByJessica CollinsGenderFemaleOccupationLawyerArmstead & HarlowFamilyHarrison Davies,Tru Davies,Richard Davies,Jorden Davies,Claire Davies,Oliver DaviesFirst AppearancePilotLast AppearanceDaddy's GirlTotal Episodes15 Armstead & Harlow Meredith DaviesisTru's sister. She has a drug problem and is currently in rehab. Meredith is portrayed byJessica Collins, and was a series regular from episodes 1-13 ofseason one.

characters.name: Nick Kelly
characters.description: Nick KellyGenderMaleOccupationFire FighterStatusDeadOnly ApperancePutting Out Fires Nick Kellywas a character that appeared in season one's episodePutting Out Fires. A firefighter that was killed in a fire but then askedTrufor help. He was killed again in the same fire on his and Tru's first day together, though he did save a little girl that died with him before when he asked Tru for help.

Richard is played byCotter Smith. He is credited asSpecial Guest Starin the second season. He formerly had the same 'gift' thatJack Harpernow has, and had their mother killed because of it. Jack Harper works for him, and they both share the same ideology.

characters.name: Sarah Webb
characters.description: Sarah WebbPortrayed ByCobie SmuldersGenderFemaleStatusAliveOnly ApperanceBrother's Keeper Sarah Webbis a character that appears in the season 1 episodeBrother's Keeper. She is a love interest forHarrison Davies, and at the start of the episode they have been dating 3 weeks. But it is later revealed that she is using him in order to kill her husbandAndrew Webb.

characters.name: Tru Davies
characters.description: Tru DaviesPortrayed ByEliza DushkuGenderFemaleOccupationForensics AttendantFamilyRichard Davies&Elise Laura Davies(parents)Jorden Davies(Step mother)Harrison Davies,Meredith Davies,Claire Davies,Oliver Davies,(siblings)StatusAliveFirst AppearancePilotLast Appearance'Twas The Night Before Christmas...AgainTotal Episodes27 Tru Daviesis the main character in theFOXsupernatural dramaTru Calling, portrayed byEliza Dushku. At the age of only 12 years old, Tru witnessed the murder of her mother,Elise Davies. Later in the series, it is revealed that the hitman who killed her was hired by Tru's father, Richard. After her mother's demise, Tru, her younger brother Harrison and older sister Meredith were abandoned by their father and little has been revealed about who raised them from that point on. Tru is shown to be protective and kind-hearted. She is usually very sympathetic to others and during a rewind will try to help her family or friends with their problem. She also felt bad for forgetting Lindsey's birthday..
